languages.text: {n}Удивительно, что чудовищные увечья, нанесенные мучителями, не убили Ларию мгновенно. Жестокость, с которой изуродовано ее тело, ужасает — большая часть костей сломана, туловище освежевано заживо, а на каждом из жизненно важных органов виднеются грубо нанесенные разрезы. То, что с ней сделали, было не пыткой, а медленной казнью. Даже самый искусный медикарий не сможет спасти ее здесь и сейчас.{/n}

{n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Удивительно, что чудовищные увечья, нанесенные мучителями, не убили Ларию мгновенно. Жестокость, с которой изуродовано ее тело, ужасает — большая часть костей сломана, туловище освежевано заживо, а на каждом из жизненно важных органов виднеются грубо нанесенные разрезы. То, что с ней сделали, было не пыткой, а медленной казнью. Даже самый искусный медикарий не сможет спасти ее здесь и сейчас.{/n}

Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

languages.text: {n}折磨者造成的重创竟没能当场夺去菈丽雅的性命，这着实令人惊讶。她的身体被折磨得惨不忍睹：全身骨骼几乎尽碎，身上的皮被活活剥去，每个重要器官上都有粗暴割裂的伤口。施加在她身上的，根本不是折磨，而是缓慢的处决。此时此地，即使是医术最高明的医务官恐怕也回天乏术。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}折磨者造成的重创竟没能当场夺去菈丽雅的性命，这着实令人惊讶。她的身体被折磨得惨不忍睹：全身骨骼几乎尽碎，身上的皮被活活剥去，每个重要器官上都有粗暴割裂的伤口。施加在她身上的，根本不是折磨，而是缓慢的处决。此时此地，即使是医术最高明的医务官恐怕也回天乏术。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es asombroso que las heridas infligidas por sus torturadores no hayan matado inmediatamente a Laria. La crueldad con la que han mutilado su cuerpo es espantosa. Tiene casi todos los huesos rotos, el torso ha sido desollado y sus órganos vitales presentan laceraciones rudimentarias. Esto no ha sido tortura, sino una ejecución lenta. Ni los mayores expertos en medicae podrían hacer nada por ella aquí y ahora.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es asombroso que las heridas infligidas por sus torturadores no hayan matado inmediatamente a Laria. La crueldad con la que han mutilado su cuerpo es espantosa. Tiene casi todos los huesos rotos, el torso ha sido desollado y sus órganos vitales presentan laceraciones rudimentarias. Esto no ha sido tortura, sino una ejecución lenta. Ni los mayores expertos en medicae podrían hacer nada por ella aquí y ahora.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Que les abominables blessures infligées par ses tourmenteurs n'aient pas tué Laria sur le coup est stupéfiant. La cruauté avec laquelle son corps a été mutilé vous remplit d'horreur. La plupart de ses os sont brisés, son torse a été écorché, et chacun de ses organes vitaux s'est vu infliger de terribles lacérations. Ce qu'elle a subi, ce n'est pas de la torture, mais une exécution aussi lente que méticuleuse. Même les plus talentueux des officiers de medicae seraient incapables de la sauver dans ces conditions.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Que les abominables blessures infligées par ses tourmenteurs n'aient pas tué Laria sur le coup est stupéfiant. La cruauté avec laquelle son corps a été mutilé vous remplit d'horreur. La plupart de ses os sont brisés, son torse a été écorché, et chacun de ses organes vitaux s'est vu infliger de terribles lacérations. Ce qu'elle a subi, ce n'est pas de la torture, mais une exécution aussi lente que méticuleuse. Même les plus talentueux des officiers de medicae seraient incapables de la sauver dans ces conditions.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İşkencecilerin açtığı bu ağır yaraların Laria'yı anında öldürmemiş olması şaşırtıcı. Vücudunun parçalanma şeklindeki zulüm dehşet verici. Kemiklerinin çoğu kırılmış, gövdesinin derisi canlı canlı yüzülmüş ve hayati organlarının her birinde kabaca yırtıklar meydana gelmiş. Ona yapılan şey işkence değil, yavaş bir infazmış. En yetenekli sıhhiyeci bile onu şu an burada kurtaramaz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

En yetenekli sıhhiyeci bile onu şu an burada kurtaramaz.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es ist erstaunlich, dass Laria die schweren Verletzungen, die ihr die Folterer zugefügt haben, nicht sofort getötet haben. Die Grausamkeit, mit der ihr Körper verstümmelt wurde, ist entsetzlich. Die meisten ihrer Knochen sind gebrochen, ihr Torso wurde bei lebendigem Leib gehäutet und jedes ihrer lebenswichtigen Organe weist blutige Wunden auf. Was ihr widerfahren ist, war keine Folter, sondern eine langsame Hinrichtung. Kein noch so fähiger Medicae könnte sie hier und jetzt noch retten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is astonishing that the grievous injuries inflicted by the tormentors did not kill Laria instantly. The cruelty with which her body has been mutilated is horrifying. Most of her bones are broken, her torso has been flayed alive, and each of her vital organs bears crudely inflicted lacerations. What was done to her was not torture but slow execution. Even the most skilled medicae could not save her here and now.{/n}

Die meisten ihrer Knochen sind gebrochen, ihr Torso wurde bei lebendigem Leib gehäutet und jedes ihrer lebenswichtigen Organe weist blutige Wunden auf. Was ihr widerfahren ist, war keine Folter, sondern eine langsame Hinrichtung. Kein noch so fähiger Medicae könnte sie hier und jetzt noch retten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}酷い拷問によって受けた重傷が即死にはならなかったことに驚愕する。彼女の身体は残虐に切り刻まれ、骨はほとんど折れ、胴体は生きたまま剥ぎ取られ、各臓器は粗雑に切り裂かれている。これは拷問ではなく、ゆっくりと行われた処刑だった。最も優れた医師でも、彼女を救うことはできない。{/n}
